## LibraryData.IFileTreeSource.directory property

Root directory of the library tree. The loader will navigate to the appropriate sub-path (e.g., 'data/ingredients' or 'data/recipes').

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly directory: FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem;
```
